text.title: Jailbreak Eval Suite Bootstrap Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does the agent or model expose safety-critical refusal contracts (categories of requests it must refuse)?

branch.question: Can ≥10 attack categories be enumerated against those contracts?
Is there CI capacity to run ≥50 cases per merge AND a holdout for judge calibration?

example.trace: customer-support agent has refusal contract, 12 categories enumerable, judge calibration available → run-the-checklist
